setup_task.sh sets deploy_alt.text = '500.0'. verifier.py checks main_deploy_alt <= 244.0.
setup_task.sh sets height_el.text = '0.015'. verifier.py checks max_fin_height >= 0.050.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on an authentic OpenRocket example file (dual_parachute_deployment.ork) created by Joe Pfeiffer. The task involves four injected compliance violations: drogue deploy event changed to altitude (must be restored to apogee), main deploy altitude set to 500m (must be <=244m), fin height reduced to 15mm (must be restored to >=50mm for stability), and simulations cleared to outdated (must be re-run). The verifier logic awards a maximum of 100 points across these fixes and the creation of a compliance memo at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/compliance_memo.txt', requiring a minimum score of 60 to pass.
